## Summary

Describe the problem and the completed scope.

## Specification references

- [ ] Relevant docs and playbook versions are linked.
- [ ] Architecture decisions or scope changes are documented.

## Research integrity

- [ ] Exact numbers retain provenance.
- [ ] Facts, management claims, consensus, and inference remain separated.
- [ ] Company-specific rules are in versioned YAML, not hard-coded prompts.
- [ ] Prediction immutability and validation independence are preserved.
- [ ] Learning changes use proposals and approval gates.

## Verification

List unit, integration, golden, and manual checks performed.

## Data and migration impact

Describe schema, storage, configuration, or migration changes.

## Risks and limitations

List known failure modes, unsupported cases, and follow-up work.
